features: Rich, silky, all-over hydration with a tropical twist.
Infused with a tropical scent, it gets to work on your natural radiance.
Exotic aroma burst soothes your soul.
description: Product Description Boost your skin's luminosity in a moment with our Kiwi Paradise Body Butter. Infused with a tropical scent, it gets to work on your natural radiance as the exotic aroma burst soothes your soul. Vegan Friendly. Ingredients Water (Aqua), Mineral Oil (Paraffinum Liquidum ), Palmitic Acid, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-25, Synthetic Beeswax, Actinidia Chinensis (Kiwi) Fruit Extract, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Stearic Acid, Triethanolamine, Dimethicone, Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Hydroxyacetophenone, PEG-20 Stearate, Polyacrylamide, C13-14 Isoalkane, Chlorphenesin, Fragrance (Parfum), Laureth-7, Cetearyl Olivate, Sorbitan Olivate, 1,2-Hexanediol. Directions Apply a generous amount to clean, dry skin. Massage in to skin until fully absorbed. Use daily for best results. Safety Warning Use only as directed. If product gets into eyes, rinse with water. See more
